markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 21, 2026 8 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 80.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Sonia Citron records 3+ three pointers in the Washington at Minnesota women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jun 21, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the Washington at Minnesota women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jun 21, 2026. If a player is active but never takes the court, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game the market settles based on the player's threes recorded.

Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Juan Soto is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
